svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Claude" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="text-to-video" name="Text-to-Video System"> <mxGraphModel dx="1406" dy="746" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1400" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="client" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;strokeWidth=2;" value="Client" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="100" x="290" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="gateway" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;" value="LB / API Gateway" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="460" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rateLimiter" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=1;" value="Rate Limiter
Check Quota" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="460" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="backend" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;strokeWidth=2;" value="Backend Server" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="120" x="670" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="db" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=10;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=1;" value="DB" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="60" x="700" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="queue" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=2;" value="Queue" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="100" x="860" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="workflowController" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e8dff5;strokeColor=#9673a6;strokeWidth=2;" value="Workflow
Controller" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="120" x="850" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="preprocessing" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=1;" value="Pre-processing" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="130" x="1020" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="inference" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e8dff5;strokeColor=#9673a6;strokeWidth=2;" value="Model Inference" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="45" width="130" x="1020" y="362.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="postprocessing" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=1;" value="Post-processing" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="130" x="1020" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cdn" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;strokeWidth=2;" value="CDN" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="100" x="600" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="client" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#333333;strokeWidth=2;" target="gateway"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" />
